name_en: Oversized logo 🚩🚩 French Coffee ☕️ Color. Very practical. OHANEL Vintage custom cowhide. The real thing is super retro and looks great, a favorite for autumn and winter. In my heart, it is firmly number one because it is so unique and rare. The cocoa coffee brown double pocket chain bag is a must-have for sisters 👭. It combines the calfskin, large bag, adjustable chain, and silver buckle—these major perfect elements. Similar styles have been released many times, but this suede brown is the one that hits me the most. The leather looks like cowhide texture but feels like thick matte suede. The chain can be worn as a crossbody bag. Lightweight, can fit a computer + iPad! Dimensions: 34x25x10cm
